name: Xeon Platinum 8580 DDR5-4400 (per socket)
source: Intel Xeon Platinum 8580 (Emerald Rapids): 8 DDR5 channels per socket. Lab config populated with DDR5-4400. 2048 GB total across the dual-socket server => 1024 GB per socket/node.
notes: CPU-managed node memory tier for one Xeon 8580 socket. Capacity 1024 GB (half of the 2048 GB dual-socket server). Bandwidth 8 channels x 4400 MT/s x 8 B ~= 281.6 GB/s per socket.
